feed.title: realufo.org — Peru · OIFAA
feed.subtitle: Latest declassified records mirrored from Peru · OIFAA.
feed.rights: Per-source jurisdiction (US 17 U.S.C. §105, UK OGL v3, France Loi 78-753, Brazil LAI 12.527, Chile 20.285, etc.)

entry.title: Fuerza Aérea del Perú — official site
entry.summary: FAP's institutional site. OIFAA reactivation announcement and subsequent communiqués are published here.

entry.title: Ministerio de Defensa del Perú
entry.summary: Parent ministry. OIFAA-related ministerial decrees and policy publications are filed here.

entry.title: Archivo General de la Nación — Perú
entry.summary: Peru's national archives. Long-term custodian of declassified FAP records including those produced by OIFAA.
